entry.title: Re: Random P-User selected during login to Community 2024...
entry.content: This has also not been forgotten, I am waiting for a reply.

entry.title: Re: CSP Error in UI API Extension in SAP B1 Webclient
entry.content:
I think this can help: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_WEB_CLIENT/e6ac71d18c7543828bd4463f77d67ff7/e4e00e09480044de8ae9d87e7090ce64.html?version=10.0_FP_2305&locale=en-US

Go To the Web Client > Settings > General Settings > and there is a text-edit where you can write your site to it

entry.title: Lines with No Open Qty on Scheduling Agreement still appears on ZDSR report
entry.content:
Hello all,

My organization uses the ZDSR100 report to determine what is past due/has not shipped. 

We recently started using scheduling agreements for blanket orders and have been having some issues with items that have already shipped and have no open qty still showing up as past due.

Is there a way to prevent lines with no open qty from showing up on our ZDSR100 report without removing the line from the scheduling agreement? (I've been told that if you remove any lines manually, it could prevent future schedules from posting via EDI. Is this true?)

Thanks everyone in advance for your assistance!

entry.title: Re: What You Need to Know About Blogging Post-Migration
entry.content:
Hi @jerryjanda,
Hi fellow bloggers,

is there an overview which HTML is supportend and which isn't?

I have a FAQ blog post where I need to link questions and answers - more or less this is just a simple table of content. How can I do this with the new platform? What I had so far used simple anchors:

<a href="#A1">Question 1</a>

<h3 id="A1">Question 1</h3>
<p>Answer to Question 1</p>

Thanks & Best Regards
Andreas

entry.title: New Pipeline Concept features: integrated runtimes and supporting landscape stages
entry.content:
I like to let you know that a new version 1.0.9 of the Pipeline Concept has been recently shipped with a couple of new enhancements that help you to improve the overall performance, operation and lifecycle when using the Pipelines package for Cloud Integration. At a glance, the following new features and fixes have been introduced:

  • Supporting different tenant stages, e.g., DEV, QA, PRD
  • New integrated messaging runtime "Pipeline Generic Step02 - Integrated Messaging Runtime Async" combining inbound conversion and receiver/interface determination in one pipeline step
  • New integrated messaging runtime "Pipeline Generic Step02 - Integrated Messaging Runtime Sync" for handling synchronous Content-Based-Routing scenarios
  • New template "Pipeline Template Step01 - Inbound Processing Synchronous" for scenario-specific synchronous inbound processing
  • New template "Pipeline Template Step07 - Outbound Processing Synchronous" for scenario-specific synchronous outbound processing
  • Generic inbound processing for XI supports both asynchronous and synchronous messaging
  • Failed test messages end with escalation instead of completed
  • Added custom error handling for generic XI and IDoc inbound flows

The package can be accessed from the SAP Business Accelerator Hub. If you have already copied the package to your workspace in your SAP Integration Suite tenant, you can simply run the update of the package to be able to use the latest features.

Let me briefly describe the major new features.

Integrated messaging runtime - Async

In the previous package version 1.0.8, we shipped the option to combine receiver and interface determination in one single XSLT mapping for an improved runtime behavior. Now, with the new version, we introduced a new pipeline step called Pipeline Generic Step02 - Integrated Messaging Runtime Async which combines the inbound conversion as well as the receiver and interface determination in one single pipeline step. This helps to further improve the runtime behavior as well as monitoring and operation.

When using this new integrated pipeline step, you are able to skip most of the other pipeline steps. So, you can reduce the number of JMS queues required to process your messages from 4 to 2 or 8 to 4 when counting in the dead letter queues as well. This integrated messaging runtime only works with the combined receiver and interface determination XSLT, so we can reduce the number of XSLT to a minimum of 1. If you like to use this integrated pipeline instead of the fully decoupled pipeline, you just need to deploy the new generic flow and configure the JMS queue of the scenario-specific inbound processing flow accordingly, by default the name of the inbound processing queue of the integrated pipeline is PIPX01 instead of PIPQ01.

From performance measurements that we did, we know that reading and writing from and to the JMS queues incl. zipping and unzipping the messages as well as fetching the XSLT mappings from the Partner Directory incl. decoding the XSLT require the most CPU consumption within the overall pipeline processing. So, using the integrated messaging runtime helps to reduce the overall CPU consumption compared to the fully decoupled pipeline with 4 generic integration flows instead of 2.

Furthermore, since we run through less number of pipeline steps, the number of message processing logs is also reduced.

We still support the complete pipeline which is shown here:

Recommendation however is to use the integrated pipeline. This picture nicely illustrates which steps and queues can be saved.

Integrated messaging runtime - Sync

With the new version, we now also support a synchronous pipeline. The new pipeline called Pipeline Generic Step02 - Integrated Messaging Runtime Sync combines the receiver and interface determination in one single pipeline step and is suited for handling synchronous Content-Based-Router scenarios. Other than the async pipelines, it doesn't require any JMS queue, instead the pipeline steps are connected using the ProcessDirect adapter which is synchronous by nature.

Supporting landscape stages

On Cloud Integration, you do not necessarily have to have different business system names depending on the landscape stage such as DEV, QA, PRD. For XI and IDoc however you usually do. In SAP Process Orchestration, you maintain the business systems as well as transport groups in its SLD, and when transporting the objects between the stages, the business names are automatically converted. This is not supported in Cloud Integration, so we came up with the following approach to support different stages without the need converting the system names when transporting across the stages.

Within the pipeline, we actually use alias names for the business systems. During runtime, the actual sender business system name is mapped to a sender alias which is used within the pipeline processing, once the receiver alias has been determined, it is then mapped to the actual receiver business name. This allows you to run your scenarios on the different landscape stages without changing the configuration in the Partner Directory such as the XSLT for determining the receivers. So, all partner and scenario definitions in the Partner Directory are the same on all stages based on the alias names. As said, there is no need to do any changes in the XSLT, so this approach is less error prone.

To setup the support for landscape stages, you need to create the business system aliases as partner IDs in the Partner Directory where for each stage you maintain the mapping between alias name and actual names.

Furthermore, to automatically identify the landscape stage of your tenant during runtime, the tenant names are used which are mapped to the corresponding stage IDs. This mapping is stored in the Partner Directory using partner ID SAP_Integration_Suite_Landscape. To do so, you can either use the Partner Directory API or the new Partner Directory user interface.

Single point of entry for any XI inbound scenarios

With the latest enhancements of the Cloud Integration capability of SAP Integration Suite, we support the so called handled by integration flow option for both the XI sender and the XI receiver adapter. In the generic XI inbound processing flow we have changed the XI sender adapter using this very option. With this, we can reduce the number of JMS queues by one. Since we write the messages into an inbound JMS queue anyway, we do not need to use the XI sender specific JMS queue. Furthermore, this option allows us to receive both async and sync calls via the same inbound adapter. So, this reduces the configuration effort in your sender backend, there is no need any more to maintain the IS_URL configuration parameter, all scenarios can be pointed to the very same end point on Cloud Integration.

If you like to try out the pipeline concept in general and the new features in particular, check out this github repository where I describe how to setup sample scenarios using the pipeline concept. Here, we have added the following new scenarios and scenario variants leveraging the new features:

  • Scenario 2D uses the new asynchronous integrated messaging runtime for a recipient list and interface split scenario.
  • Scenario 8 handles a synchronous Point-to-Point with XI inbound.
  • Scenario 9 uses the new synchronous integrated messaging runtime for a synchronous content-based-router pattern.

As usually, in case of feedback, feel free to reach out to me.

entry.title: Is it possible to integrate/link equipment with asset on SAP public cloud?
entry.content: The asset number field does not exist in equipment master so how can we link asset with equipment? Does this functionality exist in standard SAP public cloud system?

entry.title: Re: Project Change Request Feature/APP/Functionality (Por...
entry.content:
Hi Bogdan, 

I understand you are talking about SAP S/4 HANA private cloud, where your are using PPM. 

As per my experience, you can create the different financial plans at ppm item level and then push to PS project under different version in that way you can be able to keep a track of all the changes. 

You can easily compare those versions in SAP PS and then required approvals are processed. 

Hope this helps

Regards 

K

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps for SAP Launchpad Service – Part 4
entry.content:
Hi @carlos_vegasgarca 
in that case you are running the apps standalone. You should provide an html page which contains the needed resource mappings. 
The standalone app router should be able to forward to all apps on the involved app-hosts as well, however the URLs do not contain a destination GUID.

However without more details I won't be able to help you further.

Regards Matthias

entry.title: Re: Disabling the Mobile App for Multiple Profiles
entry.content: Yes, you are correct. This feature can’t be controlled via Admin Center.

entry.title: Re: Upcoming Deprecation of VBScript, its Impact on SAP GUI Scripting and Resulting Strategy
entry.content:
Hello Stefan,

your hint is very useful and interesting, thanks!
By the way, I just tried as you suggested, and created a JS file with exactly your example code in order to just test the first SAP connection mechanism.

I ran it through a CMD session with elevated privileges too, using wscript command followed by filename, but I get the error pop-up below:

 

What could be the reason? is something related to our SAP rules ?
Unfortunately the built-in record & playback scripting feature does not record in JS, cause I wanted to have a sample file from the recording itself, and also in online threads I don't find that much regarding SAPGUI scripting in JS language.

Thanks for the kind answer.

entry.title: Re: How to pass exact error details received from backend...
entry.content: If the backend system sends an error payload, store it in a property. Use a Groovy Script to extract and modify the response and send it as a body to sender.

entry.title: Flexible workflow
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

I have created the Flexible scenario in SWDD_SCENARIO and activated the scenario.

But when I trigger it, I is not triggered. I checked SWEL transaction and there is an error message "Feedback After Error"

Receiver FM SWW_WI_CREATE_VIA_EVE
RFC Destination WORKFLOW_LOCAL_200

 

User Name SAP_WFRT
Main Program SAPMSSY1
Action Feedback after error

 

I have checked RFC Destination WORKFLOW_LOCAL_200 and found that it is working fine. 

Automatic Workflow customizing has been performed in SWU3 transaction.

Maintain Runtime Environment -> Configure RFC Destination.

 

Can somebody help regarding this error?

 

Thanks in advance.

Osman.

 

SAP Business Workflow

entry.title: Re: EKKO-FRGSX not updating for customised Contract Type ZMK
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to update the "Created by" (ERNAM) field in the EKKO table for a contract (Purchasing Document Category (BSTYP) = K). I used 'BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE', but it is not updating the "Created by" (ERNAM) field, even though other fields are being updated successfully. I also used the commit BAPI, but the issue persists.

Could you please advise if there is any alternative method to update this field? Are there any available BADIs or User Exits that can be used for this purpose?

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,
Iyappan K

entry.title: Cancellation document pending – Cannot release via VFX3
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am facing an issue with a cancellation document that remains pending and has not generated the expected accounting documents.

Situation:

A billing document was canceled using VF11.
The original invoice belongs to a closed posting period (November), and the cancellation was attempted in December.
The cancellation document remains pending and did not generate the expected accounting entries.

What I tried:

I attempted to release the document using VFX3, but this requires modifying OB52 to reopen the posting period, which is not an option in this case.

Considered Option:

I am evaluating the possibility of canceling the S1 document using an S2 document.
However, I need more details regarding the copy control settings for this process, as I do not have access to SAP Note 388489.

Questions:

Is it viable to cancel S1 with S2 in this scenario?
Could someone provide details about the copy control settings for this process?
Are there alternative solutions to process the cancellation without modifying OB52?


I appreciate any suggestions or experiences you can share.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: CDS view with Change Data Capture(CDC) for Replication Flow – Part 1
entry.content: Thanks, will look into it! I really appreciate the help @Cocquerel !

another question: we added 25 country/region specific hris elements to a bundle, however not for all the country code is showing, which is quite confusing. Please see screenshot below. The ones marked red are correct. Do you have any idea how this could be possible and how this should be fixed?

Thanks,
Linda

entry.title: Hello Community
entry.content:
Hello All,

This is Vedant. I am an EWM consultant with a domain knowledge of Warehousing.

entry.title: Re: IPS Trasformation add Org Member Roles
entry.content:
Hello @dirkwiegele,

I also got the same error message: "An unparsed group id must have exactly 2 or 3 logical parts" but I managed to make it work by creating a new group with the following properties:

  • Name: "aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-123456789123 organization_user" (pattern: "<org_ID> <org_role>")
  • Display Name: "BTP_CF_PM_*****_OrgUsers" (according to the btp.cf.pm.group.prefix property value in the target system)

Aside from that, I made no changes to the default transformation except removing "%btp.cf.pm.landscape%" from the condition because I didn't want to include the landscape in the Display Name.

From my understanding, the error message is misleading, as it is not the group ID but the group name that must have 2 or 3 logical parts: either "<org_ID> <org_role>" or "<org_ID> <space_ID> <space_role>", as commented in the default transformation.

I hope this helps!

Best regards

Tobias

entry.title: Re: disp-work, Dispatcher, GRAY, Stopped, , ,10102
entry.content:
When you added the new system (HANADB SID) you should choose "SAP HANA, platform edition" as the product name, otherwise you won't see the proper license option.

Also, you need to have purchased the license to use SAP HANA DB,  and that license is properly assigned to the contract were you are registering the system.

entry.title: Re: Benefits auto enrolment for New Hires and auto delimitation for Terminations
entry.content:
Hello again,

Sorry to bother, but Im having some issues regarding automatic Enrollment (job runs with success) and under Benefits Overview it creates "Important Links" just as I've configured, but nothing about the Benefit (Insurance Type)

Portlet:

Job:

________________________________________________________________

Additional Prints about my configuration:

Benefit Work/Life Event Configuration:

Benefit Work/Life Event:

Benefit Event Determination:

 

 

Determine Benefit/work event rule:

Currently im configuring on a demo system to a incoming client implementation.

Any help is appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Can I write the one or Standard Unit Test for my all ABAP Code ?
entry.content: You'll learn by yourself. It's probably not worth unit testing everything. With SE24 (not ADT), you may generate one test method per method to test, it's usually not a good practice, but it may accelerate a little bit the writing of a template. Anyway, the template is only a small part of the whole time needed to write the unit tests.

entry.title: Error during import of clipboard contents
entry.content:
Using FM: ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE, we tried to execute the program in background, but we encountered this error "Error during import of clipboard contents".


When we run it in foreground, it is working normally. may we know what would be the resolution for this?

entry.title: Re: Flexible workflow
entry.content: I can find several reasons and solutions: https://www.google.com/search?q=%22workflow%22+%22Feedback+After+Error%22%20site:sap.com

entry.title: Re: Error occured while settling the Asset AUC
entry.content:
Have you set the negative indicator on in AUC depreciation areas?

3136595 Settlement error "Check amount entered (Amount is too high)" AA317 / Check amount entered (Amount is too high)" AA316

entry.title: Re: Sold subscription product on invoice issued from S4ha...
entry.content: There is no action to expose the field 'SoldProduct' for CDS-View I_BillingDocumentRequestItem and it would be really strange if this field is missing... In this What's New you can find the information about the enhancement of the output form for the mentioned fields: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/ee9ee0ca4c3942068ea584d2f929b5b1/a846771f021a4193a03f7472eb0ae4a1.html?locale=en-US&version=2408.09

entry.title: Re: How to check your custom ABAP code for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi @Prabaharan_Asokan,

if you mean ABAP AI SDK, there is no publicly available information yet about the support of S/4HANA 2021 on-premise, stay tuned.

There is an APIs to programmatically start ATC runs, get ATC results and process ATC exemptions (entry point CL_SATCAPI).

Kind Regards,
Olga.

Entendo que por algum tempo ainda será necessário a linha de ICMS uma vez que sera gradual a mudança. Não?
Então eu ACHO que a SAP vai demorar pra mudar essa lógica. Mas é total acho mesmo. 🙂

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Enum declaration and accessing values
entry.content:
(1) yes. Use casting.

(2) CONV enum_type( dobj ). Documented here ABAP Keyword Documentation

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA iDoc CREDAT and CRETIM format changes sending via ALE
entry.content: SAP S/4 HANA and using port type Transactional RFC. Version is IDoc 4.x. RFC destination is a TCP/IP Connection.

entry.title: Re: Kyma APIRule v2alpha1: MaxAge default causing an error in Terraform
entry.content: @bchwila thanks for responding! Something that wasn't clear to me -- is the intent that I should be able to run this upgrade as-is, or should I be running an import into the v2alpha1 resource for what's actually there? My impression from all the blog posts was that I'd be able to do this without needing to import the existing resource again. I apologize that it appears I missed a bit of crucial context! The error I see is on Terraform plan, I see "Error: Failed to update proposed state from prior state" in addition to the "AttributeName("maxAge"): can't use tftypes.String as tftypes.Number" error.

entry.title: Re: How to check your custom ABAP code for SAP BTP ABAP Environment

thanks for the quick turnaround.

Also any plans tentative for on-premise customers on 2021 or 2023?

entry.title: Error at Onboarding API
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are getting the below error at the Onboarding API configured in CPI system. We are using Onboarding SOAP API to get the new hire record from onboarding. Please let us know why we are getting this error and how to resolve it.

<GetNewhireRecordResult>
<NewhireRecord>00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000</NewhireRecord>
<Errors>
<Error>
<ErrorCode>500</ErrorCode>
<ErrorDescription>Concurrency violation: the UpdateCommand affected 0 of the expected 1 records.</ErrorDescription>
</Error>
<Error>
<ErrorCode>500</ErrorCode>
<ErrorDescription>Concurrency violation: the UpdateCommand affected 0 of the expected 1 records.</ErrorDescription>
</Error>
<Error>
<ErrorCode>500</ErrorCode>
<ErrorDescription>Concurrency violation: the UpdateCommand affected 0 of the expected 1 records.</ErrorDescription>
</Error>
</Errors>
</GetNewhireRecordResult>

entry.title: Predetermined URL for contacts
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm new to SAP, currently testing on a trial environment, and looking for creating predetermined URLs to access directly a specific contact. I review the following article, https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/sap-cloud-for-customer-set-up-guide/predetermining-urls-for-direct-navigation, however I couldn't manage to create a URL bringing me directly to a specific contact. How can I find the UUID ? And what would be an example of URL ?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: CDS view with Change Data Capture(CDC) for Replication Flow – Part 1
entry.content:
@Cocquerel , could not find that "Replication with deltas" in any of the SAP roadmap items 😕

The closest one I found (for Q1 2025) is : https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?q=%2522SQL%2520Services%2522&range=FIRST-LAST#;INNO=A710F8E3EB331EEF84C0E840288E31B9 but there they do not mention deltas.

Thanks in advance, in case you have the item handy. 

Dani.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud CBC Organizational Structure Default Company Code and Cloud Warehouse
entry.content:
Dear All

We are configuring Organizational Structure within CBC but while confirming the organizational structure, system is prompting to confirm the Default Company Code for each country and Cloud Warehouse relation to a storage location.

Kindly confirm what is the objective and impact of assigning the default company code and linking a Cloud Warehouse to storage location. Please also explain the purpose of Cloud Warehouse as we dont have any such requirement neither implementing EWM but its mandatory to create organizational structure.

entry.title: Re: How to check your custom ABAP code for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi @Prabaharan_Asokan,

ABAP AI SDK is planned to be released with the upcoming release of SAP BTP ABAP Environment, it is also planned to support SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition and S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition and on-premise (starting with release 2025), downports to lower S/4HANA releases are also planned. Stay tuned, the official release information will be shared also in the SAP community.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Adding MRP controller number to Purchase order number
entry.content: Most widely used UI-Path and there are few more options but i am not aware.

Regards.

Can somebody explain me process wise the difference between the following activities for authorization object F_BKPF_BUK?

  • 10  - Post
  • 22 - Enter, Include Assign

  •

entry.title: SAP SAC Not Showing Description from OData v4 Metadata
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I have a custom OData v4 endpoint that includes the sap:label property in its metadata. I am trying to pass descriptions to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) while creating a model. However, the descriptions are not being displayed in SAC based on my metadata.

I have tried using the following annotations:

  • Org.OData.Core.V1.Description
  • Org.OData.Core.V1.LongDescription
  • sap:label
  • sap:Heading
  • sap.QuickInfo
  • Core.Description

Despite these efforts, SAC does not seem to recognize the description fields. I am testing this in an SAP Analytics Cloud Trial Environment.

Environment:

  • OData Version: 4.0
  • SAC Environment: Trial

Has anyone successfully resolved this issue or encountered a similar challenge? Any guidance or best practices would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP Tech Bytes: UI Theme Designer - Applying Custom Theme to UI5 Application
entry.content: Thanks for your prompt response. The Base folder was missing as I probably do not have the icons and fonts from the base theme anywhere else. After moving Base folder to the themes folder it did work.

entry.title: Re: How to check your custom ABAP code for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content: Hi @OlgaDolinskaja thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Send PDF with XML file via email to your business partner
entry.content:
We identified a problem in the template provided by SAP Note 3532295: the ICMS Tax Status is not being covered correctly. The model available only includes the two-digit field, which may cause inconsistencies when filling out the NF-es.

This configuration conflicts with SAP Note 3363012, which defines the need for a Tax Situation field with full format (Full Size and Content). This means that, when using the SAP Note 3532295 template, NF-es can be generated with incomplete tax information, impacting tax compliance.

Template SN 3532295:

Tamplate SN 3363012:

entry.title: Página Web da Comunidade SAP do Brasil está no ar pela 1ª vez!
entry.content:
Agora é possível ver tudo que está acontecendo na Comunidade SAP no Brasil em 1 só lugar com um visual desenhado em alto nível.

Visitem: https://sitbrazil.com/

e não esqueçam de dizer o que acharam!

entry.title: Re: Error at Onboarding API
entry.content:
The error you're encountering, *"Concurrency violation: the Update Command affected 0 of the expected 1 records,"* typically occurs when there is a mismatch between the expected state of the data and the actual state during an update operation. This can happen in systems where concurrency control is enforced, such as when using optimistic concurrency mechanisms.

Here’s a breakdown of the issue and potential steps to resolve it:

---

### *Possible Causes*
1. *Data Conflict*:
- The record you're trying to update or retrieve may have been modified by another process or user after it was initially read, causing a mismatch in the expected state.

2. *Stale Data*:
- The system might be working with outdated or stale data, leading to a concurrency violation when attempting to update the record.

3. *API Configuration*:
- The Onboarding SOAP API might not be properly configured in your CPI (Cloud Platform Integration) system, leading to incorrect handling of the record.

4. *Database Locking*:
- If the database or system uses locking mechanisms, the record might be locked by another process, preventing the update.

5. *Empty or Invalid Record*:
- The NewhireRecord field in the response is 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000, which suggests that the record might not exist or is invalid.

---

### *Example Debugging Steps*
1. *Check the Request Payload*:
- Ensure the request payload sent to the Onboarding API is correct and includes all required fields.

2. *Simulate the API Call*:
- Use a tool like  SOAPUI to manually test the API call and verify the response.

3. *Review API Documentation*:
- Refer to the Onboarding SOAP API documentation to ensure you're using the correct endpoints and parameters.

---

entry.title: Re: How can SAP Build and SAP Integration Suite support your journey to SAP S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content: If you are not very familiar with the clean core strategy, you may be interested in this blog post from @steffen_pietsch: "For an in-depth look at clean core and how to implement it, read our Clean Core Extensibility paper!". It brings links to many useful resources!

Could you please let me know what is inbound exchange rate webservice in sap.i have to flow data from sap to another sap system using webservice.

entry.title: Re: How to mass delete physical inventory documents on sa...
entry.content: Thanks JaiSrinivasan

entry.title: Send mail notification if PO output fail
entry.content:
We need to send Email notification if Purchase Order output fails.

The user is also looking for the reason mentioned in email for which the PO output has failed.

entry.title: SAP CAL Template - AWS Organisation SCP issue "SimulatePrincipalPolicy"
entry.content:
Hello Community

We try to deploy SAP System into our own AWS Account, but facing severals unknow issues.

Whole configuration regards to user management "user" - standard policy and customer inline policy - are implemented as described from AWS https://caldocs.hana.ondemand.com/caldocs/help/AWS_FAQs.pdf point of view. User has a valid AK/SK and is just configured for AWS CLI / API needs.

During few more validaitons, we getting the following issue from SimulatePrincipalPolicy point of view.

After a deep dive and execution command via console there is a result for each KMS part "implicitDeny" and it feels like workflow is crashing and there is no possiblity to deploy SAP System from SAP CAL point of view.

Any ideas how to fix this issue in general, each new deployment is mentioned issue with AWS KMS and failed always?

Who is taking care of the overall deployment workflow/implementation SAP or AWS?

If something missing for validation or further deep dive please let me know.

Thanks in advance and your support.

Regards

Ringo

entry.title: Not able to add custom Field in the Cutover templet
entry.content:
Dear SAP team, 


We are not able to add a custom field in the pricing condition migration template. Could you kindly suggest how this can be done?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Not able to add custom Field in the Cutover templet
entry.content:
Hello Team,

You need to check the blog on how you can modify the migration object using object modeler application.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-work-with-standard-migration-object-in-migration-object-modeler-app/ba-p/13807510

We are adding more objects towards this list to modify , currently the below objects are only supported.

https://me.sap.com/notes/2999428

 

If your object is not listed above, then kindly submit a feature request by following the below KBA.

https://me.sap.com/notes/2676589

entry.title: CCM Sales Rebates- Posting accruals adjustment instead of accrual reversal at the time of settlement
entry.content:
My client has following accounting requirements for CCM accruals and settlement postings.

Example Contract: Sales Rebate (0S01)
Contract period - 1 month
Business volume sales: €50,000
Accrual rate: 10 %
Rebate rate: 10 %

Accrual Posting: Delta Accrual at end of the month: €5000
Dr Accrual Expense account (P/L) €5000
CR Accrual Provision account (B/S) €5000

Scenario -1
Settlement at the end of month where settlement amount calculated based on business volume
Calculated Settlement amount: €5000

Accounting postings (Client Requirement)

Cr Customer €5000
Dr Accrual Provision account (B/S) €5000

Accounting entries (CCM standard)

Cr Customer €5000
Dr Accrual Expense account (P/L) €5000

Dr Accrual Provision account (B/S) €5000
Cr Accrual Expense account (P/L) €5000

(Note: All open accruals are reversed)

Scenario -2

Settlement at the end of month where settlement amount is less than the calculated amount based on business volume

Calculated Settlement amount: €5000
Manual settlement amount using REV1 (Rebate verified condition) € 4000

Settlement Accounting postings (Client Requirement)

Cr Customer €4000
Dr Accrual Provision account (B/S) €4000

Dr Accrual Provision account (B/S) € 1000
Cr Accrual Expense account (P/L) € 1000

Accounting entries (CCM standard)

Cr Customer €4000
Dr Accrual Expense account (P/L) €4000

Dr Accrual Provision account (B/S) €5000
Cr Accrual Expense account (P/L) €5000

I am using standard Settlement pricing procedure A10005 and Rebate Delta Accrual pricing procedure A10006. CCM Contract type: 0S01 Sales Rebate, Settlement Doc type: 0S12, Settlement Process type: 0S10

The CCM standard accounting reverses the accrual while client needs only accrual adjustment to be posted at the time of settlement. 

Does anyone know how to achieve the above requirement?

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit Error
entry.content: Hello @User_B   what worked for us was after getting the error, we returned to do the mapping and then try to load it. It seems that the process is inverted but it worked for us.

entry.title: Re: Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) Artifact with SAP Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
Hello,

When I navigate to Integration Suite Development (Go Application) → Settings → Transport and select Transport Management Service, I encounter an issue where the Transport mode shows as "None".

I've found that it needs to be edited and choose Transport Management Service, but I'm still having an Error in the http client:{0}:Error while getting slpManagementClient: Not Found

I previously configured this in Standard mode without any issues, but now I am facing this problem while trying to configure CTM in the Free Tier.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue, or does anyone have any insights into what might be causing this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Migration of PO with third-party item. How to reference to purchase requisition in migration file?
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,
we have an issue while migration a PO with a third-party item.
After migrating the PO and posting GR, the sales order can't be billed because the GR isn't recognized in the sales order.
In my opinion the reason seems to be that the reference to the purchase requisition is missing in the migrated PO-position.
Unfortunately the migration file has no field to enter the purchase requisition.

How can we solve this in S4 Public Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Migration of PO with third-party item. How to referen...
entry.content:
Hello Team,

You can use Migration object modeler and see if you can incorporate any field of your choice to accommodate Purchase requisition field. Check the prerequisite in the blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-work-with-standard-migration-object-in-migration-object-modeler-app/ba-p/13807510

Another workaround would be, you can use an unused field in the template (Text fields) where you can pass the Purchase requisition number as a text. This will get appended to that character field in the Purchase order.

If you need a specific field for the same and it should be provided by SAP then kindly submit a feature request.

https://me.sap.com/notes/2676589

Thanks

entry.title: Re: No User Prompt When Testing CAP Project Locally in BAS
entry.content: IT can disable basic authentication on browsers. For example in windows there are registry keys that can be fiddled with to not allow basic authentication as a method, which would prevent that popup from ever showing. See if this webpage helps: https://superuser.com/questions/1866733/why-isnt-google-chrome-showing-basic-auth

entry.title: Re: Error while making a HTTP request from ABAP REPORT PR...
entry.content:
Hi @Sandra_Rossi, thank you for your reply here. I have two questions regarding it:-

1). Will the all values / data of the certificate remains same in S/4 as that of ECC?
2). Do I also need to maintain anything in SM59 as it was suggested in another community thread.

Once again, thank you for you help.
Best regards,
Rohit

entry.title: Enhance MIR7 multiple account assignment ALV
entry.content:
I want to add another column to the multiple account assignment ALV(The WBS description). Is it possible without any Repair object?
 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Enhance MIR7 multiple account assignment ALV
entry.content:
Please check with your ABAP team this information. Here is a step-by-step guide on how you might approach adding a column to the Multiple Account Assignment ALV window in MIRO:

1. Determine the Required Field/Column:

  • Identify the additional information you want to display in the ALV grid. This could be a standard field that is not currently displayed or a custom field that needs to be added.

2. Use Business Add-In (BAdI) for Enhancing MIRO:

  • SAP provides several BAdIs that can be used to enhance standard transactions. One BAdI commonly used for enhancing the invoice verification process in MIRO is BADI_FDCB_SUBBAS01 or INVOICE_UPDATE.

    Steps to Implement a BAdI:
    • Transaction Code SE18/SE19:
      • Use transaction code SE18 or SE19 to create an implementation for the desired BAdI.
    • Find the Relevant BAdI:
      • BAdI INVOICE_UPDATE or BADI_FDCB_SUBBAS01 could be used for custom enhancements in MIRO.
    • Define Methods:
      • Implement the necessary methods to include the custom logic for displaying additional columns in the ALV grid.

3. Create/Enhance a Custom Structure:

  • You may need to create or enhance a custom structure that includes the new fields you want to display in the ALV grid.

    Steps for Custom Structure:
    • Transaction Code SE11:
      • Use transaction code SE11 to create or enhance a structure.
    • Include Custom Fields:
      • Add the custom fields you want to display in the structure.
    • Associate the Structure:
      • Make sure this structure is associated with the BAdI or enhancement implementation.

4. Adjust ALV Layout:

  • The ALV layout configuration can be adjusted to include the new column. This can be done using the appropriate enhancement spots where the ALV layout is defined.

    Adjusting ALV Layout:
    • Enhance Layout Configuration:
      • Update the ALV layout configuration in the enhancement implementation to include the new column.
    • Modify Field Catalog:
      • Add the new field to the field catalog used by the ALV grid.
    • Example Function Module for ALV:
      • Use function modules like REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY if applicable, and enhance the field catalog to include the new field.

5. Test the Enhanced MIRO Transaction:

  • After making the necessary enhancements, conduct thorough testing to ensure that the new column appears as expected in the Multiple Account Assignment ALV window.

 

Example Scenario:

Assume you want to add a custom field named ZZ_CUSTOM_FIELD to display additional assignment information in the Multiple Account Assignment ALV window. You would:

  1. Define ZZ_CUSTOM_FIELD in a custom structure.
  2. Implement a BAdI like BADI_FDCB_SUBBAS01 and enhance the field catalog to include ZZ_CUSTOM_FIELD.
  3. Adjust the ALV layout configuration to display this new field.
  4. Test the MIRO transaction to ensure that the ZZ_CUSTOM_FIELD is appropriately displayed.

entry.title: Re: Rebate Amount Based on two Different Target Quantitie...
entry.content: Hi Gauthier - My client has same requirement as above but for Sales Rebate scenario. I understand from some documents that one can use condition type REBT - Total rebate volume and REBV as Rebate business volume . In addition using a group column in the Business Volume Selection Criteria which can flag certain materials to be part of Rebate scale volume ( REBV) and others to be part of total business volume (REBT). However, I do not know the configuration steps as the REBT condition is not part of the standard delivery in my system. Any one has configured the above solution?

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if there is more information about TIH, specifically focus on the use cases of the HXM suite, as shown in the image I can understand broadly, however, I would like to deepen for each of them, example;

For the recruitment module, it is mentioned that it makes a match of the skills described in the CV vs. those of the job profile and tells you how many matches are found, but this match is made by means of ID's or by the tags of the skills.

For the Performance module, the skills and competency ratings are updated in the growth portfolio, and for the development module how does it connect, what data travels, etc?

For the LMS module I understand that the attributes must be mapped with the courses, in the use case it is mentioned that when a course is finished it is updated in the growth portfolio, but the grades are updated, and but I must assign a grade to the courses, and it must be according to my scale of grades of my attributes or how does it work?

In general terms I would like to have more specific information for each use case; data that travels, requirements, impacts, technical configurations, modules it interacts with.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Portuguese National Budget for 2025- Payroll Legal Changes
entry.content:
Hi @AMGoa ,

Thanks for you doubt share. I would like to go a little deeper on our explanation:

How is tax calculated with IRS Jovem?

While exempt income is not directly taxed, it is included when calculating the tax rate applied to your remaining taxable income. Your employer will withhold taxes based on your total income, including the exempt amount. However, the tax rate and the respective rebate is only applied to the taxable amount of your income, considering your applicable year of exemption.

 

Lets see an example of calculation to get more clarification:

  • Supposing that the employee is not married lives in mainland (continente) and has no dependents.
  • IRS table will be table I.

The right process shall be working as follow:

  • 1st. Step: Based on Reference amount, it goes to the tax table and get the following values:

Reference basis

2500

 

Tax rate

38,72%

Tax table

Rebate

465,03

Tax table

  • 2nd. Step: Get the right incidence basis:

Initial Incidence basis

2500

 

Year (of “IRS Jovem”)

1 

 

Monthly limit

2052,68

Formula: IAS*55/14

Final Incidence Basis 

447,32

Formula:

Total Initial Incidence basis  - MIN(100%*2500;Monthly limit)= 2500-2052,68=447,32

  • 3rd. Step IRS calculation

 

FINAL IRS 

-291,8277 so = 0

Get the final  incidence basis *rate -rebate= IRS (it cannot be negative)

 

Related with your phrase:

"We believe the percentage should also be applied to that parcel to get the IRS amount correctly."

It is not clear to me what you mean, but if it is related with proportional calculation of rebate, I didn't saw any thing in the law about it.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Rebate Amount Based on two Different Target Quantitie...
entry.content:
Hi @hemants2, 

Please find below a screenshot of the REBT condition type which should be part of the standard configuration: 

In your case, indeed we can use REBT if you're based on $ volume and not quantity for Product Mix. 
Technically, it's possible for both Product Mix type but not that flexible and some extra configuration. 

To my knowledge, there is no official SAP configuration document for this functionality, as SAP Settlement Management allows for numerous configuration combinations. I highly recommend exploring the system hands-on—reviewing each field in the configuration and testing various scenarios will help you gain a better understanding of how it behaves in different cases.

Regarding REBT, you will usually need to touch the following configuration steps: 

  • Add REBT in the required pricing procedure for Settlement Management
  • Maintain the Condition determination relevancy and Copy control
  • Modify the Profile of Business volume (Amount field / Amount field Split criteria / Additional Quantities) 
  • Create a pricing routine
  • ... 

Regards, 
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: No found message error when deploy to sap_java_buildpack
entry.content:
Hello community,

I am doing a simple deployment of an sprint boot project to cloud foundry 

sap_java_buildpack - I receive no error in cf push command, however when I click url I got no found message.
This is the manifest:
---
applications:
- name: demoapp
  path: target\demoapp-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.war
  random-route: true
  memory: 1024M
  buildpacks:
  - sap_java_buildpack
 
This is the java version I used in local machine sapMachine jdk.
openjdk 11.0.25 2024-10-15 LTS
OpenJDK Runtime Environment SapMachine (build 11.0.25+9-LTS-sapmachine)
OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM SapMachine (build 11.0.25+9-LTS-sapmachine, mixed mode)
 
Pom file
<java.version>11</java.version>
 
I expect this to work once deployed:http://localhost:8080/test --> result this is a test
@RequestMapping("/test")
    public String testApi() {
        return "this is a test";
    }
 
I will appreciate any idea why app is not working in BTP.
 
Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Scrap in production confirmation
entry.content:
Hi @yKim ,

the scrap fields in your screenshots are used to maintain planned scrap. That's why they are empty although you have confirmed scrap.

The status "delivered" is set automatically if you post a final confirmation with automatic goods receipt of the produced material (e.g. use a control key for automatic goods receipt for the last routing operation). If you receive the material with a separate goods receipt posting the status is not updated. However you could manually flag "delivery completed" during goods receipt posting.

Kind regards
Franziska

entry.title: Re: Maintain restrictions in business role
entry.content:
Hi @jacekbedzikowski ,

I tried to duplicate your concern, and found there was a problem. Restriction is not working for this app.

Do you mind opening a ticket with SAP in the component LO-MD-BP and ask our support to further investigate the problem?

Post your ticket number here and I can provide more info to my colleagues to get to the bottom of the issue, including the test cases I did.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
@Alessio_Virecci 

Hi

I took the liberty of answering you, I hope it will help you to solve your doubt,
With talent Intelligence Hub, we now use the term attributes like Competencies, Skills, Aspirations, Preferences, etc.
If you deactivate your competencies library, I understand that this would affect your job profile, competencies and role assignments, if your process is like this, you will no longer be able to evaluate competencies in your performance evaluations.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Comunidade SIT Brazil
entry.content: Adorei o nosso site. Ficou muito bonito.

entry.title: Re: CCM Sales Rebates- Posting accruals adjustment instea...
entry.content:
Hi @hemants2, 

I recommend checking pricing routine 91 maintained in the pricing procedure for the condition type REA5 to better understand how the system is handling accrual reversals.

What you’re describing is standard SAP CCM behavior. The system assumes that if there is an open accrual at the time of Final Settlement document creation, it should be fully reversed since no further settlement is expected. However, at the time of Partial Settlement, any remaining open accrual amount is retained in case it is needed later within the contract period.

Standard Accrual Reversal Logic in CCM:

  • During Partial/Final Settlement, the system reverses the accrual (affecting the Balance Sheet Account and P&L). Note that for these reversal postings, no tax code is populated in the FI document.
  • + system posts the calculated rebate amount to the Customer/Vendor account and a corresponding P&L account, this time with tax code populated. 

Alternatives if Full Accrual Reversal at Final Settlement is Not Desired:

  1. Use Manual Settlement: Utilize WB2R_DOC_ENTRY instead of automatic settlement.
  2. Modify Pricing Routine 91: This would change how accruals are handled, though I do not recommend this approach unless absolutely necessary.
  3. Adjust Configuration: Configure the system to prevent automatic accrual reversal during Partial/Final Settlement if this aligns with your business requirements.


Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: FSM - The Query API returns fewer rows than specified in the limit.
entry.content:
The Query API does not return the exact number of rows specified in the limit when the limit exceeds 100.

The following query returns only 50 rows instead of the expected 101, even though the limit is set to 101. However, it correctly returns the specified number of rows when the limit is 100 or less.

SELECT sc from ServiceCall sc limit 101;

The above query was executed via the Query API in the Admin portal.

entry.title: Re: aseuserkey and ssl
entry.content:
Hi,

Please use this syntax. Windows is a little different:

C:\Users\me>aseuserstore set mykey2 "host 5000 ssl=\"CN=ASEname\"" sa password

C:\Users\me>isql -k mykey2
1>

Hope this helps,
Ryan

entry.title: Re: SAP Crystal Reports for Eclipse v2 EOMM
entry.content: Thanks Don. One problem with that page is under PAM (updated) section, the link still points to SP 30

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing 25.02 Release enhancements and new capabilities
entry.content:
* This blog post is Work In Progress and will be constantly updated in the upcoming days.
Do you like this content? Please live a Kudos!
 
SFC-Based Scheduling

The brand new SFC-Based Scheduling feature of Resource Orchestration (REO), which is part of SAP Digital Manufacturing 2502 Release, enables the scheduling of individual SFCs and their related operation activities against work centers. Once an order is released, this new feature allows for the generation of SFC schedules, which can then be scheduled against work centers using all available scheduling algorithms.

 Learn more at: SFC-Based Dispatching in Resource Orchestration

Automatic Retry of Actions in Subscriptions

If a production process, service, or message publishing is a subscription action and it fails, you can ask the system to retry it automatically in the Manage Automatic Triggers app. You also have the option to define whether the action is retried sequentially or in parallel in the automatic retry settings.

Monitor Event Business Rules

You can monitor and track the condition evaluation and action trigger status of all event-type business rules over a specified period of time with the Monitor Event Business Rules app.

Review by Exception POD Plugin

You can use this plugin to review, approve, and reject deviation resolutions in the manufacturing process in the Work Center POD.

The following roles are implemented to control access to actions in the Review by Exception plugin: NC_Review and NC_Approve.

In the Manage Nonconformance Groups app, you can control if nonconformance groups can be used in the Review by Exception plugin by configuring the Relevant for Electronic Batch Record setting. 

Start and End Elements Included in Canvas by Default

The start and end elements are ready to use in the canvas as soon as you create a new production process in the Design Production Processes app.

SAP Hosted Email Service for Alert-related Email Notifications

In the Settings tab of the Manage Alert Configurations app, you can select the SAP Hosted Email Service option to have alerts-related email notifications be sent through an SAP hosted email service. When you select SAP Hosted Email Service, no additional configuration is required, so you don't need to set up mail server configurations.

It's important to know that if you'd previously set up a customer hosted email service through the process outlined in Configure Email Notifications, the alert-related email notifications will continue to be sent through that customer hosted email service.

Standalone (Non-WIP) Data Collection

A Standalone (Non-WIP) option is added in the user interface of the Manage Data Collection app that allows you to collect data at an SFC level independent of the status of the SFC or the location on the routing or the recipe. The following endpoint is added to the Data Collection API: POST /standalone/log for logging Standalone (Non-WIP) Data Collection.

Publish MQTT Messages from Automation Sequences

Using the Publish MQTT Message built-in service, you can publish MQTT messages to the message broker from automation sequences in the Design Production Processes app.

Service Order Download Enhancement

You can download these service order fields from your integrated SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA system:
Final due date of the service order
Storage location and batch number of components
Operation duration unit of measure
Task list type
Group
Group counter
Reservation item and reservation number of components
Maintenance plan

These fields aren't part of the standard IORDER01 IDoc, so SAP Digital Manufacturing fetches them after the IDoc download using a BAPI call. For this call to work, you need to map your plant to the destination of your ERP system in SAP Cloud Integration under Plant Settings in your SAP S/4HANA Integration with SAP Digital Manufacturing integration package. The Service Order IORDER01 pre-process request artifact, which is part of the IORDER01_STD_PREXSLT standard pre-xslt workflow available in the Manage Integration Workflows app, uses the destination to make the BAPI call to your ERP system.

Personalize the Skill Matrix Columns

In the Skill Matrix app, you can personalize the skill matrix columns according to your preferences. As a production supervisor, you can select necessary skills from the comprehensive master list to customize the Skill Matrix application. This customization feature is compatible with both SAP SuccessFactors integration and third-party HR integration scenarios.

Uploading Custom POD Plugins

You can now upload a custom POD plugin directly to POD Designer with the Extensions tab.

Using the SFC Card Plugin to Display Resource Statuses

In POD Designer, when you've enabled the Resource Displayed configuration option of the SFC Card plugin to display the status of a resource in your POD, the corresponding colored icon is now also displayed.

 

And much more! See What´s New for more.

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: IBP XYZ Segmentation
entry.content:
I have an issue where the XYZ value calculated via an Excel template does not match what is calculated through the IBP XYZ Segmentation process.

As additional information (in case it makes a difference), the key figure being used is stored at the technical week level though the segmentation is set to a periodicity of Month and then is run for the past 12 months. Also, nulls are set up to be treated as zeroes.

Product A and Product B in the attached file have the same basic "look" - both not having data in Jan 2024. But, the one seems to be calculating the XYZ value correctly and the other, not. 

Is there something else I should be checking that would make a difference in the CoV that IBP is calculating vs. what I've calculated in Excel? Is there anyway to create a key figure that would show the calculated CoV value?

Thank you, in advance, for any insight you can provide.
